name: Yamana Gold Inc.
description: Yamana Gold Inc. was a Canadian-based precious metals producer with significant gold and silver production, development stage properties, exploration properties, and land positions throughout the Americas, including Canada, Brazil, Chile, and Argentina. The company focused on building on this production base through expansion and optimization initiatives at existing operating mines, development of new mines, the advancement of its exploration properties, and, at times, targeting other gold consolidation opportunities with a primary focus in the Americas.
